title: Pyrus nitidus
intro: Pyrus nitidus, also known as the Chinese pear, is a deciduous tree species native to China, characterized by its showy white flowers and edible fruit. The health benefits of Pyrus nitidus include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its traditional use in treating various ailments such as fever and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Pyrus nitidus include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects. The most common herbal preparations made from Pyrus nitidus include tea, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to promote health and well-being in traditional Chinese medicine.
